EmailTemplate.description: Rich HTML email sent when a new AI recommendation is created for a customer
EmailTemplate.name: New AI Recommendation
EmailTemplate.subject: 🤖 New AI Product Recommendation: {!Recommendation__c.Product__r.Name} — {!Recommendation__c.Predicted_Rating__c}/5.0
EmailTemplate.textOnly: Hello {!Recommendation__c.Customer__r.Name}, Our AI model recommends {!Recommendation__c.Product__r.Name} with a predicted rating of {!Recommendation__c.Predicted_Rating__c}/5.0. View it here: {!LEFT($Api.Partner_Server_URL_260, FIND('/services', $Api.Partner_Server_URL_260))}/{!Recommendation__c.Id}
